name: Arctech Solar Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Arctech Solar Holding Co., Ltd. provides solar tracking and racking systems for utilities, commercial, industrial, and residential projects worldwide. The company offers solar trackers, such as horizontal single axis trackers, horizontal single axis trackers with tilted modules, and tilt single axis trackers that improve the amount of the electricity through orientation of the PV panels towards the sun; and seasonal tilt, and dual and single pole mounting structures. As of December 31, 2018, it had a cumulatively installed capacity of approximately 19 GW; and had completed approximately 700 projects in 24 countries. The company is headquartered in Kunshan, China.
